scripts.dev: concurrently -n convex,server,web -c '#a78bfa,#f97316,#38bdf8' 'convex dev' 'npm run dev -w @arcwell/server' 'npm run dev -w @arcwell/web'
scripts.build: npm run build -w @arcwell/web && npm run build -w @arcwell/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @arcwell/server && npm run typecheck -w @arcwell/web
